ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store or outlet */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service provided by the store (e.g., Salon, Spa) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the store */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the store was registered in the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the store (e.g., Active, Suspended, Deactivated) */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the store */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the store */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last quality inspection */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the last inspection */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees working at the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store offering the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., Haircut, Facial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the service */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the service in minutes */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the service */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the service */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the service details were last updated */,
  "equipment_needed" TEXT /* Equipment required for the service */,
  "service_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary service provider for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being booked */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date of the appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the appointment (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the appointment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the appointment */,
  "service_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider handling the appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the appointment */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_service_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_provider_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_services" TEXT /* Preferred services of the customer */,
  "communication_preferences" TEXT /* Communication preferences of the customer */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last visit */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store managed by the manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manager */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date when the manager was hired */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the manager within the franchise */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the manager */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last training session attended by the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "total_bookings" INTEGER /* Total number of bookings for the service on the given date */,
  "customer_feedback" TEXT /* Customer feedback for the service */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the service */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the service */,
  "num_complaints" INTEGER /* Number of complaints received for the service */,
  "satisfaction_score" INTEGER /* Satisfaction score based on customer feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_performance_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store whose status is logged */,
  "changed_status" TEXT /* New status of the store */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was changed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the status change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_logs_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
